patients.name: Rohan Mehta
patients.medicalHistory: Tear of ACL (Anterior Cruciate Ligament) in right knee, left lumbar muscle strain.
patients.currentCondition: Post-op ACL reconstruction rehabilitation - Week 4. Restricted range of motion, mild joint effusion, muscle atrophy in quadriceps.
patients.notes: Patient is responding well to isometric squats and active-assisted range of motion exercise. Avoid deep squats.

patients.name: Sunita Deshpande
patients.medicalHistory: Diabetes Type II, osteoporosis, osteoarthritic knee joints.
patients.currentCondition: Severe bilateral osteoarthritis of the knees. Reports grade 7 pain during morning stairs. Stiffness lasts for 45 minutes.
patients.notes: Focusing on closed-chain exercises, gentle hamstring stretching, and ultrasound therapy on the joint capsule.

patients.name: Amit Kulkarni
patients.medicalHistory: Sedentary software developer. History of occasional migraines.
patients.currentCondition: Cervicogenic headache and cervical spondylosis. Numbness in right index finger, limited neck rotation.
patients.notes: Applying manual cervical traction, deep neck flexor strengthening. Advised ergonomic adjustments for screen height.

appointments.notes: Home visit for knee strengthening exercises.
